_publications._publicationTitle: Neurofibromatosis-1 heterozygosity increases microglia in a spatially and temporally restricted pattern relevant to mouse optic glioma formation and growth.

_contextSnippet: 43% decrease in the number of Iba1-positive cells...optic glioma proliferation was decreased by 63%
details: GCV treatment during early development (3-5 weeks) resulted in 43% decrease in microglia and 63% decrease in optic glioma proliferation
